## Scope

<!--
Per CONTRIBUTING.md, each pull request should be scoped to a single
TODO.md item (or a single, self-contained improvement of similar size).
-->

- [ ] This PR addresses exactly one `TODO.md` item (or one small,
      self-contained improvement of similar scope).
- [ ] If it closes a backlog item, the corresponding `TODO.md` line has
      been updated from `- [ ]` to `- [x]`, with no other lines changed.
